entities.name: workouts.db
entities.context: SQLite database storing V's workout data, located at Personal/Health/workouts.db

entities.name: Workout Efficiency Metric
entities.context: Formula: (distance_km * 1000) / (avg_hr * duration_min) — meters per heartbeat, used to track cardiovascular efficiency over time

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate Tracking
entities.context: Daily resting HR logged in daily_resting_hr table, analyzed over 14-day windows

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database engine used for local health/workout data storage

entities.name: pandas
entities.context: Python library used for querying and analyzing workout data

entities.name: Running
entities.context: Primary workout modality tracked, includes both outdoor Run and Treadmill run

entities.name: Health Tracking System
entities.context: V's personal health data infrastructure under Personal/Health/, combining workout logs with biometric trends

relationships.context: workouts.db is the central data store for the health tracking system
pandas used for data retrieval and trend analysis
SQLite provides the local database engine
Efficiency metric calculated only for Run and Treadmill run modalities
Both are cardiovascular fitness indicators tracked in the same database
Database contains the distance, duration, and avg_hr columns needed to compute efficiency
Database contains daily_resting_hr table for resting HR trend analysis
